name_cn:
💰
Y's 2024 Spring/Summer New Mini Tote
This mini tote is from the NEW SHAPE series! It uses new craftsmanship and smooth, soft calfskin. The leather is heat-pressed for a glossy, silky finish! The fan-shaped appearance and cut-out handle design make it stylish and exquisite! The bag features a versatile, avant-garde structure with two openings, allowing for both hand and crossbody/shoulder wear, perfectly adapting to any style you desire!
Model: 791069
Size: 29x19.5x10cm
